name: Baked Zucchini with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the zucchini in a colander or on towels to drain off moisture.
2. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly oiled 2-quart casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
1/3 recipe - 72 calories, 1/2 medium-fat meat exchange, 1 vegetable serving (3 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, 5 grams fat), 68 mg sodium, 128 mg potassium, 100 mg cholesterol
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
